parameters.query:
INSERT INTO yt_videos (video_id, title, channel, channel_id, published_at, duration_seconds, view_count, description, tags, url, playlist, thumbnail)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.video_id }}',
  {{ $json.title ? "'" + $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.channel ? "'" + $json.channel.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.channel_id ? "'" + $json.channel_id + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.published_at ? "'" + $json.published_at + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.duration_seconds || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.view_count || 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.description ? "'" + $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 500) + "'" : "NULL" }},
  ARRAY[{{ ($json.tags || []).map(t => "'" + t.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::TEXT[],
  '{{ $json.url }}',
  {{ $json.playlist ? "'" + $json.playlist.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : "NULL" }},
  {{ $json.thumbnail ? "'" + $json.thumbnail + "'" : "NULL" }}
)
ON CONFLICT (video_id) DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  view_count = EXCLUDED.view_count,
  extracted_at = NOW();

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $env.YT_ANALYSIS_MODEL || 'glm-4.7-flash', temperature: 0.1, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are a technology analyst. Analyze the following YouTube video transcript and extract information about technologies, tools, frameworks, and systems mentioned. Focus on things that could be integrated into an AI/ML platform (agent frameworks, MLOps tools, data engineering, observability, workflow automation, MCP servers, etc).

Respond with ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "technologies": ["list of technologies mentioned"],
  "tools": ["specific tools/products"],
  "frameworks": ["frameworks/libraries"],
  "relevance_score": 0.0 to 1.0,
  "integration_potential": "high|medium|low|none",
  "summary": "2-3 sentence summary",
  "key_takeaways": ["actionable takeaway 1", "takeaway 2"],
  "platform_relevance": "how this relates to our k3d/n8n/MLflow/agent platform"
}' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Video: ' + $json.title + ' by ' + $json.channel + '

Transcript (first 8000 chars):
' + ($json.transcript || '').substring(0, 4000) } ], max_tokens: 4000 }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO yt_analysis (video_id, technologies, tools, frameworks, relevance_score, integration_potential, summary, key_takeaways, platform_relevance, model_used)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.video_id }}',
  ARRAY[{{ ($json.technologies || []).map(t => "'" + t.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::TEXT[],
  ARRAY[{{ ($json.tools || []).map(t => "'" + t.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::TEXT[],
  ARRAY[{{ ($json.frameworks || []).map(t => "'" + t.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::TEXT[],
  {{ $json.relevance_score }},
  '{{ $json.integration_potential }}',
  '{{ ($json.summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  ARRAY[{{ ($json.key_takeaways || []).map(t => "'" + t.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'").join(',') }}]::TEXT[],
  '{{ ($json.platform_relevance || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.model_used }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (video_id) DO UPDATE SET
  technologies = EXCLUDED.technologies,
  tools = EXCLUDED.tools,
  frameworks = EXCLUDED.frameworks,
  relevance_score = EXCLUDED.relevance_score,
  integration_potential = EXCLUDED.integration_potential,
  summary = EXCLUDED.summary,
  key_takeaways = EXCLUDED.key_takeaways,
  platform_relevance = EXCLUDED.platform_relevance,
  model_used = EXCLUDED.model_used,
  analyzed_at = NOW();
